name: PDF Viewer
description: View PDF files directly in Nimbalyst
author: Nimbalyst Team

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Compatibility with the latest Nimbalyst runtime.
1.0.1: Smaller bundle and more reliable external file edits.
marketplace.tagline: View PDF documents directly in the editor
marketplace.longDescription: Open and read PDF files without leaving Nimbalyst. Renders PDF pages with full fidelity, supporting multi-page documents, zoom, and page navigation.
highlights: View PDF files inline without switching apps
Keeps your workspace context while reading documents

screenshots.alt: PDF document viewer showing a multi-page document with page navigation
